title: HOLULO Safety Lockout Padlocks with Keys, 10 Padlocks with 20 Keys Different, Insulation Outdoor Padlock,Red Safety Locks Off kit for Electricians
features: Non-conductive Insulated Design: Featuring a seamless PA66 nylon body tested for impact resistance and thermal stability (-20°C to +120°C), this safety padlock ensures maximum safety. Its insulated construction and unique shackle-to-key isolation block electrical currents, while anti-slip curved edges enhance grip in wet or gloved conditions.

Extreme Temperature Resilience: Made with a solid aluminum core and nylon insulation shackle, this padlocks with keys outdoor is long-lasting, lightweight, and non-conductive. Temperature Range: Operates effectively from -57°F to 177°F, which can withstand harsh industrial conditions like construction sites or chemical plants

Key Retaining Feature for Zero Key Loss: Each padlock with keys includes 2 keys (1 primary + 1 backup) , key retaining feature that prevents accidental lock abandonment in the open position. Ideal for securing circuit breakers, electrical switches, and machinery, this system minimises key misplacement risks

Versatile Industrial-Grade Safety Solution: Heavy duty padlock designed for industrial compliance, perfect for securing power switches, air valves, machinery, pipelines. A vital tool for lock off padlocks protocols, this lock with key includes “DANGER” tags for clear hazard labelling using permanent markers or wax crayons.

Industrial-Grade Durability – Reinforced locker padlocks with 1/4-inch (6mm) shackle diameter and 1.5-inch (3.8cm) length resist bolt cutters, sawing, and corrosion. Compact size (1.75-inch height) fits most breaker boxes, gates, and equipment
